translations.en: the humble peasant Katrina.
translations.zh: 謙遜農婦卡翠娜。

translations.en: "I'm but a simple peasant, $G."
translations.zh: 「在下不過是個尋常農婦，$G。」

translations.en: "I doubt I could help in this situation."
translations.zh: 「此事在下恐怕無能為力。」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. Wilt thou allow me to follow you again?"
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G。汝可允許在下再次隨行？」

translations.en: "Command me to @join and I will, $G."
translations.zh: 「$G，請命令在下@加入，在下即從命。」

translations.en: "As thou deem best, $G."
translations.zh: 「$G，一切全憑汝決斷。」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G! I hope thou hast fared well in thy travels?"
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G！但願汝一路旅途安好？」

translations.en: "The land rejoices when all is well with the Avatar!"
translations.zh: 「聖者安好，不列顛尼亞大地亦同歡欣！」

translations.en: "If there is aught a humble peasant can do to help, I am yours to command."
translations.zh: 「若有任何謙遜農婦力所能及之事，在下聽命於汝。」

translations.en: "$P! I had heard that thou hadst returned to our land, but I dared not believe it!"
translations.zh: 「$P！在下聽聞汝已回歸我等之地，卻不敢相信！」

translations.en: "Hast thou returned to save our land from the @gargoyles?"
translations.zh: 「汝是否歸來拯救我等之地免受@魔像族侵擾？」

translations.en: "Then surely we are saved already!"
translations.zh: 「那我等必定已得救了！」

translations.en: "Then perhaps the crisis is not so severe as rumor says."
translations.zh: 「那危機或許並不如傳言所說的那般嚴峻。」

translations.en: "If there is aught a humble peasant might do to aid thy quest, $G, I am yours to command."
translations.zh: 「$G，若有任何謙遜農婦力所能及之事足以助汝之使命，在下聽命於汝。」

translations.en: "I am called Katrina, $G, as I was the last time we met."
translations.zh: 「在下名叫卡翠娜，$G，如同我等上次相逢時一樣。」

translations.en: "Times have changed, $G. Where once I grazed sheep, now I till the land."
translations.zh: 「時移勢易，$G。昔日在下放牧羊群，如今則耕作土地。」

translations.en: "All work is the same to a peasant, $G."
translations.zh: 「$G，對農婦而言，一切勞作皆無分別。」

translations.en: "We all do what is expected of us."
translations.zh: 「我等皆各司其職，盡其本分。」

translations.en: "If thou wouldst have me @join thy quest, thou needst but ask."
translations.zh: 「若汝欲在下@加入汝的使命，只需開口相告即可。」

translations.en: "Surely I misunderstand thee, $G."
translations.zh: 「$G，在下定是誤解了汝之意思。」

translations.en: "Am I not already a member of thy band?"
translations.zh: 「在下不是已是汝隊伍中的一員了嗎？」

translations.en: "Since thou dost think it wise, I wilt join."
translations.zh: 「既然汝以為如此為妥，在下便加入。」

translations.en: "I hope I can aid thy quest."
translations.zh: 「但願在下能助汝使命一臂之力。」

translations.en: "I hesitate to deny any request thou might have."
translations.zh: 「在下不忍拒絕汝任何請求。」

translations.en: "But thou seemst to have enough companions as it is."
translations.zh: 「然汝似乎已有足夠的夥伴了。」

translations.en: "Mayhap if one of them left your band, thou might have more need of me."
translations.zh: 「或許若其中一人離開汝的隊伍，汝便更需要在下了。」

translations.en: "But $G, there is no need to join you here, aboard ship."
translations.zh: 「然而$G，在船上並無必要加入汝。」

translations.en: "There is no place else to go!"
translations.zh: 「別無他處可去！」

translations.en: "Mayhap if thou asked again ashore."
translations.zh: 「或許待上岸後汝再行詢問。」

translations.en: "Whatever thou thinkest best, $G. I'll leave my equipment with thee."
translations.zh: 「$G，一切全憑汝所認為最妥之決定。在下的裝備就留與汝。」

translations.en: "But $G, there is no place for me to go."
translations.zh: 「然而$G，在下無處可去。」

translations.en: "Mayhap this should wait until we are ashore."
translations.zh: 「或許此事應待我等上岸後再議。」

translations.en: "The gargoyles are a grave threat to the land, $G."
translations.zh: 「魔像族對大地是嚴重的威脅，$G。」

translations.en: "Many brave soldiers have died defending us from the invaders!"
translations.zh: 「已有許多勇敢的將士為守衛我等抵禦入侵者而犧牲！」

translations.en: "I am most sorry, $G, but I cannot answer thy question."
translations.zh: 「$G，在下深感抱歉，但此問題在下無法作答。」

translations.en: "'Twould be vain of me to answer truthfully, and 'twould be worse to lie."
translations.zh: 「如實回答乃自大之舉，撒謊則更糟。」
translations.note: 謙遜困境：若說自己最謙遜便是驕傲

translations.en: "May we live up to the trust placed in us."
translations.zh: 「願我等皆能不負眾人所寄之信任。」

translations.en: "Farewell! The Avatar carries with him the hopes of all the land."
translations.zh: 「珍重！聖者承載著全境人民的希望。」

translations.en: "A peasant such as myself knows little about $Z, $G."
translations.zh: 「在下不過是個農婦，對$Z知之甚少，$G。」

translations.en: "Beg pardon, $G?"
translations.zh: 「$G，請問汝說什麼？」

translator_notes: 097 Katrina: 謙遜農婦，聖者昔日同伴。本作中已改牧羊為耕田。謙遜困境：承認自己最謙遜即是驕傲。
